content.question: What is the actual distribution of parental demand for selective tracks among non-elite families, middle-class families, and elite families, and does this demand vary significantly by region (small towns vs. urban centers) or by ethnic/minority status?
content.reduction_path: Commission or obtain representative household survey data on school-choice preferences disaggregated by family income, education, region, and ethnicity; compare Fidesz-era polling data on education system satisfaction and selective-track support to current-government polling.
